doc_class_description: A Court of Appeal judgment is a higher court ruling that reviews decisions of lower courts, shaping legal precedent and protecting citizens’ rights.

latest_doc_d.description: Hatharin Kandambige Sagara Sampath Vs The Hon. Attorney General, before Hon.Amal Ranaraja, J.
latest_doc_d.parties: Hatharin Kandambige Sagara Sampath Vs The Hon. Attorney General,
latest_doc_d.keywords: Rape – Imperfect recollection of events by witness does not detract from overall credibility of the statement – Exception to the inadmissibility of hearsay evidence – The test of probability – Credibility of witness’s narration – Rejection of Accused’s dock statement
latest_doc_d.legistation: Section 364(1) of the Penal Code (Amendment Act, No.22 of 1995)
